%dw 2.0
type auto_3d00cac9_7a2b_4d26_ab07_204b21e27a67_Output_Payload = Array<Inventory__c {"typeId": "Inventory__c"}> type Inventory__c = {| Id?: String {"typeId": "Id"}, OwnerId?: String, IsDeleted?: Boolean {"typeId": "IsDeleted"}, Name?: String {"typeId": "Name"}, CreatedDate?: DateTime {"typeId": "CreatedDate"}, CreatedById?: String, LastModifiedDate?: DateTime {"typeId": "LastModifiedDate"}, LastModifiedById?: String, SystemModstamp?: DateTime {"typeId": "SystemModstamp"}, LastActivityDate?: Date {"typeId": "LastActivityDate"}, LastViewedDate?: DateTime {"typeId": "LastViewedDate"}, LastReferencedDate?: DateTime {"typeId": "LastReferencedDate"}, WarehouseStock__c?: Number {"typeId": "WarehouseStock__c"}, RegionalStock__c?: Number {"typeId": "RegionalStock__c"}, TotalInventory__c?: Number {"typeId": "TotalInventory__c"}, Status__c?: String {"typeId": "Status__c"}, ItemId__c?: Number {"typeId": "ItemId__c"}, fieldsToNull?: Array<String {"typeId": "fieldsToNull"}> |} {"typeId": "Inventory__c"}
